Hardware Component File

ITM P2 V2.4

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference ITMP2_24.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 747
Receive ID 767
Functional Addr 58
Functional Name Navigation

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "AP9",
    "soft": "0703",
    "version": "0102"
  }
]

Associated Devices

GPS antenna open circuit ID:
GPS disturbed communication ID:
Front display error ID:
Flash ROM error of control unit ID:
Gyro open circuit ID:
Audio unit connection problem ID:
CD changer connection problem ID:
Incorrect settings ID:
MM CAN controller problem ID:
DVD-ROM disc error ID:
DVD-ROM drive error ID:
Main keyboard connection problem ID:
GPS RTC internal electronic abnormality ID:
GPS RAM internal electronic abnormality ID:
GPS ROM internal electronic abnormality ID:
Gateway connection problem ID:
HFCK connection problem ID:
Bluetooth error ID:
CSW button error ID:
Antitheft lock ID:

Ecr System configuration I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 3B61FFFFFFFFFF
Reply Bytes 7B61
Ecr VIN I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 3B8100000000000000000000000000000000000000
Reply Bytes 7B81
Lect System configuration I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 2161
Reply Bytes 6161
Data Items

Reply Bytes N/A
